headline: TouchAI
subhead: A universal touch language, runtime, and adapters so AI can read intention from physical interaction—and answer with structured haptics—not only text and voice.

layers.title: Input
layers.subtitle: Touch Language
layers.body: Normalized touch streams and gesture tokens — including pinch and two-finger swipe — with per-session velocity and pressure baselines.

layers.title: Output
layers.subtitle: Haptics
layers.body: Semantic haptics (ack, confirm, clarify…) compile to neutral pulse programs, then map to Core Haptics, Android Vibrator, or the web.

layers.title: Infrastructure
layers.subtitle: Programs & envelopes
layers.body: TouchProgram rules, SessionProfile in envelopes, and JSONL for reproducible cross-device datasets.

packages.name: @touchai/touch-spec
packages.summary: v0.2.0 — SessionProfile, pinch & two_finger_swipe tokens, JSON Schema export.

packages.name: @touchai/touch-runtime
packages.summary: Session normalization, segmentGestureFromStream (multi-pointer), pattern rules, haptics.

packages.name: @touchai/touch-dataset
packages.summary: JSONL + envelope builders with sessionProfile field.

packages.name: public/touchai/runtime.mjs
packages.summary: esbuild bundle — playground matches npm packages exactly.

next: Phase 3 — Native envelope SDKs (Swift/Kotlin emit TouchEventEnvelope end-to-end)
Phase 4 — @touchai/ai-bridge: envelope stream → LLM → intent + haptic response
Phase 5 — Dataset ingest API with strict specVersion rejection
